introSection: Rhythmical Coaster (Japanese: リズミックコースター) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Harmonyland in Hiji, Hayami, Ōita, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train features a roller skate design, known for being the standard design of the Vekoma Junior Coaster. The ride isn't known to be manufactured by Vekoma however, with the track design not resembling Vekoma's.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Rhythmical Coaster on the park's website (in Japanese)

fullText:
Rhythmical Coaster (Japanese: リズミックコースター) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Harmonyland in Hiji, Hayami, Ōita, Japan.



Green track and supports.

The train features a roller skate design, known for being the standard design of the Vekoma Junior Coaster. The ride isn't known to be manufactured by Vekoma however, with the track design not resembling Vekoma's.


 * Rhythmical Coaster on the park's website (in Japanese)
